chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Bail App. No. D – 17 of 2020 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Fresh case 1. For orders on MA No.1400/2020 (U/A) 2. For orders on office objection at Flag-A 3. For orders on MA No.1401/2020 (Ex./A) 4. For hearing of bail application 10.03.2020 Mr. Fayyazuddin Rajper, Advocate for applicant / accused..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Applicant / accused Zuhaib Hassan Chang seeks protective bail in Crime No.177/2015 registered at P.S Faiz Ganj, District Khairpur for offences under Sections 123-A, 153, 505, 504, 353, 147, 149, 341, PPC and 6, Anti-Terrorism Act, 1997. It is submitted that applicant / accused is prepared to surrender before the trial Court, but apprehends his arrest as NBWs have been issued against him. Serious mala fide on the part of the police is alleged. Without touching the merits of the case, protective bail for a period of four days is granted to the applicant / accused subject to his furnishing solvent surety in the sum of Rs.50,000/- (fifty thousand) and P.R. bond in the like amount to the satisfaction of the Additional Registrar of this Court. Operation of NBWs is suspended for a period of four days. Applicant / accused is directed to surrender before the trial Court in the aforesaid period. This order shall cease to have effect after expiry of four days or whenever the applicant / accused surrenders before the trial Court, which one occurs earlier. It is made clear that in case, applicant / accused fails to surrender before the trial Court in the aforesaid period, his bail bond shall stand automatically forfeited. Criminal Bail application along with the listed applications stands disposed of in the above terms.

It is made clear that in case, applicant / accused fails to surrender before the trial Court in the aforesaid period, his bail bond shall stand automatically forfeited. Criminal Bail application along with the listed applications stands disposed of in the above terms. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
